creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: naddy
Date: Sat Jan 17 16:35:26 UTC 2015
New revision: 377236
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/377236

Log:
  * Port updated to 0.1.41
  * GUI is now enabled by default in upstream configure file
  * Tidying pkg-plist

  * This port uses the WCHAR_T extension and thus requires GNU libiconv.
    (Added by committer.)

  PR:		195402
  Submitted by:	maintainer
